8.reason: The loop should terminate when a == -1; add a check for a == -1 and break.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop should terminate when a == -1; add a check for a == -1 and break.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  The loop has no termination condition when a == -1 (end of operations), causing an infinite loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition is always true and lacks a termination check for the end-of-operations marker (-1), which will cause an infinite loop. It should be changed to check for a != -1 or include a break statement when a == -1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The loop condition is always true and lacks a termination check for the input value -1, which will cause an infinite loop. It should include a break statement when a == -1 or change the loop condition.]

52.reason: [Infinite loop: the program never checks for the termination condition (a == -1), so it will not stop reading input and will run indefinitely.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Infinite loop: the program never checks for the termination condition (a == -1), so it will not stop reading input and will run indefinitely.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Infinite loop: the loop never checks for termination condition (a == -1), causing the program to run indefinitely and never exit when input is -1.]
